summary: A Go-based monolithic project utilizing an AI agent pipeline to generate and manage extensive test suites for a runner, schema, and MCP integration.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated test files from 'glm-agents' may bloat the repository
Potential test flakiness or redundancy due to multiple overlapping 'extra-tests' directories
Uncommitted modified files in working directory indicate incomplete workflow
suggestions: Consolidate or archive the GOrchestra/glm-agents generated test directories to reduce noise
Review and deduplicate the numerous '*_extra_test.go' files to ensure they provide unique value
Commit or stash the currently modified and staged files to maintain a clean working tree
